info.name: SFDA - Saudi Food and Drug Authority API Collection
info.description:
# SFDA API Collection


A comprehensive Postman collection for the Saudi Food and Drug Authority (SFDA) public APIs.

## Authentication

This collection uses **OAuth2 Client Credentials** (Basic Auth) to obtain an access token.
The token is automatically fetched via the **Pre-request Script** and stored as `{{"{{access_token}}"}}`.

## Available Services

| Service | Base URL |
|---------|----------|
| OAuth | `https://apis.sfda.gov.sa:9002/v2/oauth` |
| Cosmetics | `https://apis.sfda.gov.sa:9002/v2/cosmetics` |
| Drugs | `https://apis.sfda.gov.sa:9002/v2/DMS` |
| Food | `https://apis.sfda.gov.sa:9002/v2/Food` |
| Medical Devices | `https://apis.sfda.gov.sa:9002/v2/dwh-md` |

## Setup

1. Click **Environment** → **Add** (or select an existing one)
2. Set **Environment variables**:
   - `SFDA_CONSUMER_KEY` = your consumer key
   - `SFDA_CONSUMER_SECRET` = your consumer secret
3. The pre-request script will auto-fetch the access token

## Related Packages

- **Laravel Package:** `aghfatehi/laravel-saudi-fda`
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/aghfatehi/laravel-saudi-fda

---
*Collection generated from SFDA OpenAPI specifications.*

item.name: Authentication
item.description:
OAuth2 Client Credentials - Get access token to consume SFDA APIs.

**Grant Type:** `client_credentials`
**Auth:** Basic (Consumer Key : Consumer Secret)
**Token Expiry:** 24 hours (86400 seconds)

exec: pm.test('Failed to obtain access token', function () {

request.description:
Obtain an access token using OAuth2 Client Credentials grant.

The Consumer Key and Consumer Secret are sent as HTTP Basic Authentication header.

The token expires in 24 hours and is automatically stored in the `access_token` collection variable.

exec: // Check if we need a new token
var needsToken = !token || !expiresAt || new Date(expiresAt) <= new Date();
console.error('SFDA: consumer_key and consumer_secret must be set in collection variables or environment.');

item.name: Cosmetics Products
item.description:
Registered cosmetics products APIs.

**Base URL:** `https://apis.sfda.gov.sa:9002/v2/cosmetics`

**Endpoints:**
- `GET /list` - List all cosmetics (paginated)
- `GET /Product_Id/{id}` - Get cosmetic by Product ID
- `GET /cosmeticNumber/{number}` - Get cosmetic by Cosmetic Number
- `GET /BarCode/{barcode}` - Get cosmetic by Barcode
- `GET /search` - Advanced search with filters
- `GET /search/{keyword}/{page}` - Search by keyword
- `GET /image/{image_code}` - Get product image

exec: pm.test('Response has data with pagination', function () {

request.description:
Get a paginated list of all registered cosmetic products.

**Parameters:**
- `page` (query, optional): Page number, defaults to 1
- `Keyword` (query, optional): Filter by keyword

response.name: Success
response.body:
{

request.description:
Advanced search for cosmetic products using multiple filters.

**Parameters:**
- `SpecificNameAr` (query, optional): Arabic name
- `SpecificName` (query, optional): English name
- `BrandName` (query, optional): Brand name
- `barCode` (query, optional): Barcode
- `CosmeticNumber` (query, optional): Cosmetic number
- `page` (query, optional): Page number (default: 1)

response.name: Success

request.description:
Search for cosmetic products by keyword with pagination.

**Path Parameters:**
- `keyword` (required): Search keyword
- `page` (required): Page number

response.name: Success

request.description:

**Path Parameters:**

item.name: Drug Products
item.description:
Registered drug products APIs.

**Base URL:** `https://apis.sfda.gov.sa:9002/v2/DMS`

**Endpoints:**
- `GET /drug/list` - List all registered drugs (paginated)

request.description:
Get a paginated list of all registered drug products.

**Parameters:**
- `page` (query, optional): Page number, defaults to 1

item.name: Food Products
item.description:
Registered food products APIs.

**Base URL:** `https://apis.sfda.gov.sa:9002/v2/Food`

**Endpoints:**
- `GET /product/list/{page}` - List all food products
- `GET /product/id/{id}` - Get food product by ID
- `GET /product/referencenumber/{ref}` - Get by reference number
- `GET /product/barcode/{barcode}` - Get by barcode
- `GET /product/search/{keyword}/{page}` - Search by keyword
- `GET /image/{image_code}` - Get product image

request.description:
Get a paginated list of all registered food products.

**Path Parameters:**
- `page` (required): Page number

Get a specific food product by its ID.

**Path Parameters:**
- `productid` (required): Numeric product ID

item.name: Get Food Product by Reference Number

request.description:
Get a specific food product by its reference number.

**Path Parameters:**
- `referencenumber` (required): Reference number

Get a specific food product by its barcode.

**Path Parameters:**
- `barcode` (required): Product barcode (digits only)

Search for food products by keyword with pagination.

**Path Parameters:**
- `keyword` (required): Search keyword/text
- `page` (required): Page number

Get a food product image by its image code.

**Path Parameters:**
- `image_code` (required): Image name/code

item.name: Medical Devices
item.description:
Registered medical device products APIs.

**Base URL:** `https://apis.sfda.gov.sa:9002/v2/dwh-md`

**Categories:**
- **Low Risk** - Low-risk medical devices
- **GHTF** - Global Harmonization Task Force devices
- **TFA** - Traditional Foreign Approval devices

item.name: Low Risk
item.description:
Low-risk medical device products.

**Endpoints:**
- `GET /Lowrisk/list/{page}` - List Low Risk devices
- `GET /Lowrisk/Product` - Get specific Low Risk product by filters
- `GET /Lowrisk/search/{keyword}/{page}` - Search Low Risk devices

request.description:
Get a paginated list of low-risk medical devices.

**Path Parameters:**
- `page` (required): Page number

Get a specific Low Risk medical device product using one or more filters.

**Query Parameters (at least one required):**
- `LowRiskID` - Low Risk ID
- `productID` - Product ID
- `AccountNumber` - Account number
- `RegistrationNumber` - Registration number
- `CrNumber` - Commercial Registration number

Search low-risk medical devices by keyword.

**Path Parameters:**
- `keyword` (required): Search keyword
- `page` (required): Page number

item.name: GHTF
item.description:
GHTF (Global Harmonization Task Force) medical device products.

**Endpoints:**
- `GET /GHTF/list/{page}` - List GHTF devices
- `GET /GHTF/Product` - Get specific GHTF product
- `GET /GHTF/Accessory/id/{id}` - Get GHTF accessory
- `GET /GHTF/search/{keyword}/{page}` - Search GHTF devices

request.description:
Get a paginated list of GHTF medical devices.

**Path Parameters:**
- `page` (required): Page number

Get a specific GHTF medical device product using one or more filters.

**Query Parameters (at least one required):**
- `PropertiesId` - Properties ID
- `MDId` - Medical Device ID
- `ReferenceNumber` - Reference number
- `AccountNumber` - Account number
- `DeviceNumber` - Device number
- `CrNumber` - Commercial Registration number

Get a specific GHTF accessory by its Properties ID.

**Path Parameters:**
- `PropertiesId` (required): Properties ID

Search GHTF medical devices by keyword.

**Path Parameters:**
- `keyword` (required): Search keyword
- `page` (required): Page number

item.name: TFA
item.description:
TFA (Traditional Foreign Approval) medical device products.

**Endpoints:**
- `GET /TFA/list/{page}` - List TFA devices
- `GET /TFA/Accessory/id/{id}` - Get TFA accessory
- `GET /TFA/search/{keyword}/{page}` - Search TFA devices

request.description:
Get a paginated list of TFA medical devices.

**Path Parameters:**
- `page` (required): Page number

Get a specific TFA accessory by its Properties ID.

**Path Parameters:**
- `PropertiesId` (required): Properties ID

Search TFA medical devices by keyword.

**Path Parameters:**
- `keyword` (required): Search keyword
- `page` (required): Page number

exec: // Runs before every request in the collection
// Skip auth for the token endpoint itself
// Check if we need a new token
var needsToken = !token || !expiresAt || new Date(expiresAt) <= new Date();
// Read credentials from Environment variables first, then fallback to Collection variables
console.warn('SFDA: Set SFDA_CONSUMER_KEY and SFDA_CONSUMER_SECRET in Environment variables.');
// Global test script - runs after every request
// Clear expired token to force refresh on next request
console.warn('SFDA: Token expired - will refresh on next request');
